name: MTOTA Fall Chapter Session - Speaker Honorarium

description: Speaker honorarium receipt for the MTOTA Q1 chapter meeting; hand therapy short talk contribution.

description: Weekend intensive facilitation fee for the Bozeman hand therapy CEU intensive; November cohort.

description: Case study contribution honorarium for the Hand Therapy Certification Commission publication.

description: Quarterly peer group honorarium for leading the hand therapy segment.

description: Small honorarium for chronic pain program education module contributions to the Missoula Community Wellness Collective.

name: MCWC Program Print Reimbursement
description: Reimbursement for chronic pain program printed handouts and workbook materials.
